prompt_text: Enemy poodles with angelic halos descend upon you in Felis Elysium. The air smells of fur and judgment. Prepare to fight!

pass.message: You defeated the poodle pack in a divine duel. You gain +1 Max Health and stride forward with purpose.

fail.message: You were overwhelmed by the fluffy holy paws of Elysium. Your journey ends here.
